name: Fake Brand Collaboration Customs Fee Scam
description: Scammer impersonating a luxury brand offering free products but demanding an advance customs fee

conversation.speaker: scammer
conversation.message: Hello, I represent a luxury brand and we need an influencer for a collaboration. We will ship you free products worth $2,000.

conversation.speaker: target
conversation.message: That's exciting! What do I need to do?

conversation.speaker: scammer
conversation.message: You need to pay a $150 customs clearance fee to our logistics partner first so the package can be released.
